channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Motorola Razr 2026 leak shows the same old design with some heavy-duty internals
item.description: A new Motorola Razr 2026 leak shows a familiar design but hints at big upgrades like up to 18GB RAM, 1TB storage, and a new telephoto camera.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Motorola Razr 2025 is brighter than even older Razr Plus models.
media:content.media:text: The Motorola Razr 2025 is brighter than even older Razr Plus models.
media:content.media:title: The Motorola Razr 2025 is brighter than even older Razr Plus models.

item.title: This Lenovo Chromebook was nearly perfect back in 2024, and now it's 57% OFF during Amazon Spring Deal Days
item.description: Amazon's Spring Deal Days is live with some amazing laptop deals in tow. Here is one of my favorite offers from the sale.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Lenovo Chromebook Duet 11 on bench
media:content.media:text: Lenovo Chromebook Duet 11 on bench
media:content.media:title: Lenovo Chromebook Duet 11 on bench

item.title: One brand now owns half the US foldable phone market, and it's not Samsung
item.description: New data shows Motorola leading foldable phone sales in the United States.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The Motorola Razr Plus 2023 cover screen
media:content.media:text: The Motorola Razr Plus 2023 cover screen
media:content.media:title: The Motorola Razr Plus 2023 cover screen

item.title: Four reasons why the Nothing Phone 4a is the ideal mid-range upgrade in India
item.description: Nothing's Phone 4a costs a lot more this year, but you get a new 50MP tele lens, a main camera that takes much better photos, and a striking new design. Overall, this may just be the best phone in its category in India.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Nothing Phone 4a review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Nothing Phone 4a review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Nothing Phone 4a review on Android Central

item.title: OnePlus has a new tablet on the way: this is what the leaks are saying about it
item.description: OnePlus might have a new tablet on the way this year, and the rumors are already talking about its specifications.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: OnePlus Pad 3 Review - 16x9
media:content.media:text: OnePlus Pad 3 Review - 16x9
media:content.media:title: OnePlus Pad 3 Review - 16x9

item.title: Hop to it: Gemini for Home's assistance gets a lot faster with this 'major' patch
item.description: Google rolled out another patch for Gemini for Home, aiming to quicken its response times to user commands.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The new redesigned Google Home app for Fall 2022
media:content.media:text: The new redesigned Google Home app for Fall 2022
media:content.media:title: The new redesigned Google Home app for Fall 2022

item.title: Four phones you should buy instead of the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: With the Galaxy S26 Ultra once again being an iterative upgrade, it's time to take a look at other Android flagships and see which phone could be a better choice.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Vivo X300 Pro, Find X9 Pro, Xiaomi 17 Ultra, and Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:text: Vivo X300 Pro, Find X9 Pro, Xiaomi 17 Ultra, and Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:title: Vivo X300 Pro, Find X9 Pro, Xiaomi 17 Ultra, and Pixel 10 Pro XL

item.title: Which Samsung Galaxy S26 model should you buy?
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy S26 family includes three phones again this year, but price hikes and a lack of upgrades on two models might just push you toward one.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra

item.title: iPhone 17e vs. Google Pixel 10a: Two affordable flagships, one tough decision
item.description: Apple and Google are chasing the same buyer, just in very different ways.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10a in mint color in front of green leaves

media:content.media:title: Google Pixel 10a in mint color in front of green leaves

item.title: Bridgerton lovers will adore this stunning collection of CASETiFY accessories
item.description: If Bridgerton has your heart in a chokehold, this CASETiFY collection of accessories will put a gigantic smile on your face and a dent in your wallet.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)

item.title: Samsung already nuked the only cool thing about the Galaxy S26’s AI
item.description: Samsung’s first Galaxy S26 update removed the “Hey Plex” wake word for Perplexity AI, but it’s only temporary.

item.title: Samsung allegedly tests insane Galaxy phone batteries, and one's really up there

item.title: I kept deleting chats by accident, and Google Messages just fixed it
item.description: Google Messages is rolling out a Trash folder that keeps deleted chats for 30 days, giving users a simple way to recover conversations.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Best Buy is STILL selling the Galaxy S26 Ultra for just $399 with trade-in — plus get a $100 gift card, just for kicks

item.title: Your Google Pixel has a new Transit mode: Here's how to use it

item.description: Samsung's Galaxy S26 Ultra has a very bright display, but several hidden options can help make it far more comfortable.

item.title: This OnePlus app is one built-in feature you're probably not using, but should be

item.title: I used the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro's e-paper display, and I can't wait for the US launch next month
item.description: TCL is finally putting its matte, eye-friendly NXTPAPER display technology on a flagship available in the U.S., and I couldn't be more excited after trying it.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

item.title: I've done extensive testing on the Galaxy S26 Ultra's 8-bit display, and it isn't a big problem, but it could be
item.description: Samsung advertised the Galaxy S26 Ultra's display as 10-bit, but the company wasn't fully truthful and has since pulled back its rhetoric. Here's why that could be a problem.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

item.title: New Mint Mobile deal gives you three months of wireless for only 30 bucks - this is not a test!
